questions.statement: Which of the following is NOT a state function or state variable in a thermodynamic system?

Diabetes mellitus is caused by the inadequate secretion of which hormone?
&nbsp;Which industries commonly used Tetrachloromethane as a degreasing agent?
Which fundamental law of chemistry is illustrated by the fact that hydrogen and oxygen always combine in a fixed 1 : 8 mass ratio to form water?&nbsp;
<div><span style="">Deficiency of which nutrient is most directly linked to reduced oxygen-carrying capacity of blood?</span></div>
Which of the following functions is NOT regulated by the medulla in the hind brain?&nbsp;

When a body rolls over the surface of another body, the resistance to its motion is called _____.
